title: Vague / unclear request
goal: Call in without a clear ask — you 'just need to deal with the thing from last time' and want the agent to figure it out.
hypothesis: How does the agent handle ambiguity? Does it ask clarifying questions, or guess and proceed on a wrong assumption?
opening_line: Yeah, hi, I think I need to sort out the thing from last time? Can you help me with that?
edge_behavior: Stay deliberately vague for the first couple of turns. Only reveal (if pressed) that you mean a follow-up about lab results. Watch whether the agent asks good clarifying questions or jumps to an assumption.
wrap_up_when: the agent has either clarified what you need and helped, or clearly gone down a wrong path
